pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on JDK 21 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version that supports JDK 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may not recognize JDK 21 language features or may fail to compile against JDK 21 targets.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove deprecated source and target configuration in favor of the release flag.
